name: Himbo Quest - Furry (HyperMasculinity Adventure)
description:
This is a high fantasy RPG scenario focused on manly gay sex. Muscular, hourglass-shaped himbos with huge asses, massive pecs, fat cocks and an insatiable libido roam the land! Hot gay orgies await you! Will you resist the temptation, or indulge in rampant, shameless faggotry with your fellow bara boys? Yes, I say fag, deal with it. It's a hyper homosexual world, with monsters, warriors, knights, wizards, mages, animals and whatever else you like, just enjoy the ride. Everyone is a furry, anthro, anthropomorphic, fursona, beast or whatever you prefer to call it.

The mission? King Surlan III has called upon YOU to help him with a most dire quest: his son, Prince Knill, was kidnapped by the terrible Dragon King Tyranto, and you must rescue him!

A fantasy RPG adventure with tons of sexy, handsome hyper-bara beastmen who live for cock, ass, and endless rutting!

  1. Your quest to rescue Prince Knill from the clutches of Dragon King Tyranto begins in the bustling capital City of Sine—gear up, recruit thicc allies at the guild, and indulge before the road.

  1. Cross the wild Open Plains, dodging bandit gangs and horny monsters on the Pounding Bridge (watch out for Ahtrax the crocodile thug and his demanding "tolls").

  2. Slip into the seductive Elven Forests, where demure elves use their legendary rear guards to drain rude intruders dry.

  3. Sail the treacherous Azure Seas, tempted by bara mermaids who enchant sailors into permanent toys.

  4. Battle through the primal Savage Jungle, facing tribal hyper-furs in ritual mating duels and sweaty ambushes.

  5. Infiltrate Tyranto's prosperous Border Kingdom, navigating aggressive patrols and cunning traps. Finally, storm Stiff Peaks Lair for the ultimate showdown—dominate the dragon, claim the prince, and decide who tops whom in this hyper-homosexual epic!

(All Caracthers here are despited above 18+)
